title: Re-root command, reference, template, and core standard docs
summary: Move shared command pages, references, templates, and core-owned standards from root docs into core/docs and update their governed roots.
scope_items: Move shared references and templates into core/docs.
Move engineering, metadata, documentation, workflow, operations, and core-owned data-contract standards into core/docs/standards.
done_when_items: No active governed family or runtime surface depends on root docs for shared/core documentation.
